headline: Northern Trust Supports Launch of Europe’s First Autocallable ETF on Waystone’s ETF ICAV platform
summary: DUBLIN, May 07, 2026--Northern Trust (Nasdaq: NTRS) today announced it has supported the launch of a new exchange‑traded fund (ETF) on the Waystone ETF ICAV, Waystone’s Irish‑domiciled white‑label multi‑manager ETF platform.
